auto_fix.fix_description: BB_SCHEMA_UNLOCK: Added strategies_include/strategies_exclude condition types to GraduatedRulesEngine. Root cause misdiagnosed in prior runs — engine DID support strategy conditions but ensemble always emits strategy='ensemble'. Fix: strategies_active param propagated through evaluate_signal() in graduated_rules.py, ensemble.py (2 sites), signal_pipeline.py. 5 BB rules added to LLM engine at gate=20% probe.
